serverInfo.name: WebCrawlerAPI-Feeds
serverInfo.title: WebCrawlerAPI Feeds
serverInfo.description: Feeds for monitoring website changes. Feeds automatically crawl the specified URL at regular intervals and detect new or changed content.

instructions: Use WebCrawlerAPI feed tools only for create and management actions: create, pause, resume, force run, webhook resend, and delete. These actions use elicitation for confirmation/input before sending mutating requests and return structuredContent plus text. Use resources and resource templates for all feed GET endpoints including list feeds, get feed details, JSON Feed, and Atom/RSS feed output. Keep tool parameters primitive; do not pass nested objects as tool parameters.
